task: Add user_goals table to Supabase: id uuid, user_id uuid references auth.users, goal_type text, target_value numeric, created_at timestamptz. RLS: only owner can read/write.
acceptance_criteria: table user_goals created with all specified columns
policy: SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE only for auth.uid() = user_id
negative_constraints: NIEMALS bestehende Tabellen oder Spalten ändern
NIEMALS DROP TABLE ohne expliziten Rollback-Plan
rollback_hint: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS user_goals; — keine abhängigen Tabellen, sicher reversibel
